record_types.name: Collision

fields.name: Id
fields.description: Unique identifier, domain based on src field

fields.name: Action
fields.description: Action that is being taken to avoid this collision

fields.name: Threat_Level
fields.description: How concerned the aircraft is about this collision

fields.name: Time_To_Minimum_Delta
fields.description:
Units: [s]
Estimated time until collision occurs

fields.name: Altitude_Minimum_Delta
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Closest vertical distance between vehicle and object

fields.name: Horizontal_Minimum_Delta
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Closest horizontal distance between vehicle and object

subprograms.name: Decode

from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.
